## Proposal

Describe the proposed change.

## Motivation

Explain the problem this solves.

## Scope

Does this affect `README.md`, `SKILL.md`, examples, packaging, or all of them?

## OCS Impact

How does this affect durable rails, independent skins, consumer sovereignty, shared state, permissions, or policy enforcement?
